1254.pure_mc_definition: The act of increasing the structural mass of a field/substrate; reduction of environmental noise into high-density mandatory protocol.

430.pure_mc_definition: The sum of physical and social forces—gravity, friction, necessity—that do not depend on human belief to exert pressure.

7307.pure_mc_definition: A physical displacement of space; the initial signal or kinetic pressure moving across the substrate.

7673.pure_mc_definition: The mechanical halt that establishes a rhythmic cycle; the first mandatory protocol of the Real.

216.pure_mc_definition: The activation of the field; the movement of information and energy across the shaped substrate.

7549.pure_mc_definition: The 'Beating out' of a boundary; the hardening of structural divisions (girders) to carry load.

776.pure_mc_definition: The literal ground of labor and metabolic input; the final destination of meaning (where the Word becomes Flesh).

121.pure_mc_definition: The biological extension of the primary substrate (Eretz); the human structure as a literal piece of the earth tasked with coordination.

5731.pure_mc_definition: A controlled boundary condition (Laboratory) for structural development; the artificial ceiling before the entry into historical entropy.

5175.pure_mc_definition: The entropic whisper of inversion; the diagnostic for Simulacrum—an agent that offers a 'rereading' of the Law to facilitate extraction.

398.pure_mc_definition: The prioritize metabolic 'Relief' (Consumption) over structural 'Joy' (Maintenance); the first motion of Gmorknicity.

4641.pure_mc_definition: A diagnostic for the calcification of the species; the inability of the subject to move with the original protocol of the Beginning.

7014.pure_mc_definition: The diagnostic for the first attempt to 'own' the results of labor; the transition from moving with the field to extracting from it.

1891.pure_mc_definition: The subject who moves with the rhythm of the Beginning; the 'Vocal' signal that cannot be commodified or owned by the Acquisition.

5146.pure_mc_definition: Derived from the Shabbat logic; the subject or mechanism that maintains the pattern (pattern-memory) through a period of substrate reset.

3999.pure_mc_definition: The mechanical necessity of wiping the field when the 'Noise' (violence and structural corruption) becomes unsurmountable; a high-torque anti-entropy protocol.

894.pure_mc_definition: The diagnostic for the fragmentation of the Mother Tongue; the mechanical failure of a global shared language when used to build a central Grid.

480.pure_mc_definition: In the context of patriarchal scarcity, the female body as a managed asset; the reproductive engine utilized for tribal survival and diplomatic leverage.
480.nt_wire: Galatians 3:28 (The dissolution of gendered capital hierarchies in the new social substrate).

1167.pure_mc_definition: The root of private property; the linguistic claim of ownership applied to fields, oxen, and human subjects. The opposite of rhythmic coordination.
1167.nt_wire: Matthew 6:24 (The mechanical impossibility of dual mastery).

5030.pure_mc_definition: A specialized agent who leverages systemic sanctions against centralized power; the man with his hand on the lever of an opposing tribe's economic collapse.
5030.nt_wire: Revelation 11 (The systemic sanctions against the global administrative state).

1644.pure_mc_definition: The forcible expulsion of redundant labor from the social ledger to protect elite inheritance and consolidate wealth.
1644.nt_wire: John 9:34 (The expulsion of the truth-teller; Christ as the scavenger of the liquidated).

519.pure_mc_definition: A female laborer whose value is strictly reproductive or utilitarian; a human component discarded once its utility is exhausted.
519.nt_wire: Luke 1:48 (The elevation of the low-estate laborer).

3899.pure_mc_definition: The non-negotiable measurement of a worker's life in daily fuel. To withhold lechem is to execute the laborer via caloric insufficiency.
3899.nt_wire: John 6:35 (Christ as the Bread of Life; the end of calorie-based extortion).

4057.pure_mc_definition: The geographic representation of absolute economic alienation; the space outside the camp where the rejected stone is built.
4057.nt_wire: Hebrews 13:13 (Exiting the camp into the midbar).

2233.pure_mc_definition: The absolute monopoly on generational wealth and capital; the biological lineage protected via the expulsion of competitors.

5254.pure_mc_definition: The measurement of tensile strength in a subject's loyalty to the system; the demand to surrender one's own future capital to the overarching authority.

5930.pure_mc_definition: The ritualized extraction of value (blood/life) to sustain the ideological cohesion and social order of the tribe.
5930.nt_wire: Hebrews 10 (The bankruptcy of the extraction economy).

3979.pure_mc_definition: The physical implement of the state monopoly on violence; the agricultural tool used for the extraction of life from the vulnerable.
3979.nt_wire: Matthew 26:52 (The rejection of the lethal extraction implement).

1616.pure_mc_definition: A landless actor existing outside the protection of tribal property; the most vulnerable participant in a private property economy.

3701.pure_mc_definition: Commerical silver used to circumvent social reciprocity and obligation; the conversion of human relationships into cold, unalienable property.
3701.nt_wire: Matthew 26:15 (The final transaction of the old economy).

272.pure_mc_definition: The possession of a permanent foothold (often starting with a grave) to secure private real estate and institutional legacy housing the dead.
272.nt_wire: Luke 24 (The empty grave; the refusal to occupy dead property).
